plugins.name: based-claudius

plugins.description: Migration-first Based workflow: a planner that decomposes a legacy page into horizontal, individually testable slices and tracks legacy-to-new feature parity, on the full Claudius router, validation, review, memory, and safety spine.

plugins.description: Artifact-first Claude Code workflow kernel for planning, implementation, validation, review, handoff, and governed learning.
